name: InterviewSync - Complete Workflow (Happy Path + All Edge Cases)

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, message: 'Super Day schedule generated and notifications sent.', schedule: $node["Code - Prepare Notifications"].json.schedule, totalSlots: $node["Code - Prepare Notifications"].json.totalSlots, totalNotifications: $node["Code - Prepare Notifications"].json.totalNotifications, aditiSummary: $node["Code - Prepare Notifications"].json.aditiSummary, generatedAt: $node["Code - Prepare Notifications"].json.generatedAt, validatedAt: $node["Code - Prepare Notifications"].json.validatedAt } }}
={{ { success: false, error: $json.error, validationErrors: $json.validationErrors, validationWarnings: $json.validationWarnings, partialSchedule: $json.partialSchedule, failedAt: $json.failedAt } }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { type: 'aditi_approval_required', disruptionType: $json.disruptionType, summary: $json.summary, escalations: $json.escalations, seniorityWarnings: $json.seniorityWarnings, updatedSchedule: $json.updatedSchedule, resolvedAt: $json.resolvedAt } }}
={{ { type: 'disruption_resolved', disruptionType: $json.disruptionType, summary: $json.summary, updatedSchedule: $json.updatedSchedule, warnings: $json.warnings, resolvedAt: $json.resolvedAt } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, message: 'Disruption partially handled. Escalated to Aditi for approval.', disruptionType: $json.disruptionType, summary: $json.summary, escalations: $json.escalations, seniorityWarnings: $json.seniorityWarnings, updatedSchedule: $json.updatedSchedule, resolvedAt: $json.resolvedAt } }}

={{ { success: true, message: 'Disruption handled and notifications sent.', disruptionType: $json.disruptionType, summary: $json.summary, updatedSchedule: $json.updatedSchedule, warnings: $json.warnings, resolvedAt: $json.resolvedAt } }}
